name_cn:
Genuine leather
游댠Medium Calfskin Anagram Tote Handbag Linen Splice Tote Feature游눤No fancy designs, simple and practical type游꺝The long and short strap design looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big游꺛Easy to easily meet daily needs, in addition to the regular classic shoulder strap游떁It also comes with a unique woven handle仇벒잺Adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo游꺜The recognizability and fashion sense are spot on游땢It's comfortable and photogenic when paired游땘Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter hand-woven handle游꺞This size version is made of calfskin游녶Features a large Anagram on the front游눎"Carry over shoulder or with top handle"Calfskin strap closure*Two internal slip pockets*Calfskin lining救넖잺
Size:29CM~25CM~14CM
Model:9300 Full Leather
Color:Plum Plain
